Admits agentic memory record proposals.

## Import

```ts
import { admitAgenticMemoryRecordProposals } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions";
```

## Signature

```ts
function admitAgenticMemoryRecordProposals(
	proposals: unknown,
	policy: unknown,
	opts: AgenticMemoryProposalAdmissionOptions<T> = {},
): AgenticMemoryProposalAdmissionSnapshot<T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `proposals` | `unknown` | proposals value used by the helper. |
| `policy` | `unknown` | Policy object used to admit, retry, or route work. |
| `opts` | `AgenticMemoryProposalAdmissionOptions<T>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

The admit agentic memory record proposals result.

## Example

```ts
import { admitAgenticMemoryRecordProposals } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/agentic-memory";
```
